evidence: Snapshot-mode create/update/delete requests are handled without upstream fetch.
Staged definitions are visible through catalog, ID, and type reads.
Meta API state exposes staged definition records and tombstones.
Meta API log preserves original raw mutation request bodies in order for commit replay.
Merchant-owned create with access.admin returns the captured ADMIN_ACCESS_INPUT_NOT_ALLOWED guardrail locally.
Definitions with associated metaobjects return an explicit local unsupported userError until entry cascade behavior is modeled.
standardMetaobjectDefinitionEnable stages the bounded local template catalog and returns TEMPLATE_NOT_FOUND for unknown template types.
